speaker: Treya
text: No… this can’t be right.

speaker: Treya
text: Those banners…

speaker: Treya
text: The Marcia Federation… here?

speaker: Treya
text: Weren’t they supposed to stay neutral?

speaker: Treya
text: I haven’t seen those gray armors since the Succession War…

speaker: Treya
text: And now they’re marching with the Durnaquian Empire…? What the hell happened…

speaker: Feld
text: Treya!

speaker: Treya
text: Feld! For the Second Goddess, don’t do that!

speaker: Feld
text: Wow. Jumping at shadows now? That’s new.

speaker: Treya
text: Don’t even start. I’ve seen you flinch when a leaf moves.

speaker: Feld
text: Hey, that leaf was suspicious.

speaker: Treya
text: Shouldn’t you be watching that kid? Keni… Poni… something?

speaker: Feld
text: That was second shift. I’m on night watch now.

speaker: Treya
text: Good. Then you’re exactly who I need right now.

speaker: Treya
text: If I tell him, there’s no going back…

speaker: Treya
text: But if I don’t, we might walk straight into it…
Tell Feld about the Marcia soldiers | Keep it to yourself for now

speaker: Treya
text: Feld… listen carefully. The Marcia Federation is here. Armed. And not alone.

speaker: Feld
text: Wait, what? That’s not possible.

speaker: Treya
text: That’s what I thought. But I saw them. With my own eyes.

speaker: Feld
text: …Then we have a problem.

speaker: Treya
text: Yeah. A big one.

uid: # High trust outcome (he backs you fully)

speaker: Feld
text: Alright. I trust you. We move now, before anyone else notices.

speaker: Treya
text: Knew I could count on you.

speaker: Feld
text: …I want to believe you. But this sounds insane, Treya.

speaker: Treya
text: Then come see it yourself.

speaker: Feld
text: Fine. But if this is nothing, you owe me a drink.

speaker: Treya
text: …It’s nothing. Forget it.

speaker: Feld
text: You sure? You don’t usually get this tense over nothing.

speaker: Treya
text: Just tired. That’s all.

speaker: Treya
text: Not yet… I need to be sure first.

speaker: Feld
text: Right… if you say so.

speaker: Feld
text: You’ve been acting strange all night. If something’s going on, I need to know.

speaker: Treya
text: …I said it’s nothing.

speaker: Feld
text: Yeah. That’s what worries me.

speaker: Feld
text: Try to get some rest when you can.

speaker: Treya
text: You too.
